title: 01019_FlexGen_High-Throughput_Generative_Inference_of_Large_Language_Models_with_a_Single_GPU
positive_examples: FlexGen enables high-throughput generative inference of large language models (LLMs) on commodity hardware, making advanced AI capabilities more accessible to a wider range of users and applications.

The ability to run LLMs with limited resources can facilitate various latency-insensitive tasks such as benchmarking, information extraction, and data wrangling, which can improve efficiency in many industries.
